title: Localization drift before aisle merge
summary: Pose confidence degraded during a congested merge. Planner entered recovery, then mission aborted.

title: Docking abort after battery sag
summary: Voltage drop triggered a safety rollback during docking. Recovery succeeded on second attempt.

title: Mission timeout after network disconnect
summary: Telemetry dropped for 14 seconds during route update and mission state machine timed out.
